headline: Senate blocks Medicare prior auth disapproval, while Westercamp nears confirmation and Flowers heads to cloture vote Monday.

senate.lastSessionSummary: The Senate voted 46-50 against advancing a disapproval resolution on Medicare's prior authorization rule. Kara Marie Westercamp's nomination for International Trade Court judge cleared cloture 49-48 and is set for confirmation. Benjamin Flowers' nomination for Sixth Circuit Judge underwent cloture proceedings with a vote scheduled for Monday.

onTheFloor.title: Congressional disapproval of Medicare prior authorization rule for WISeR Model services
Kara Marie Westercamp to be Judge of the United States Court of International Trade
Benjamin M. Flowers to be United States Circuit Judge for Sixth Circuit
Five nominees confirmed to USITC including Brett Doyle, David Foley Jr., Samuel Negatu, Peter-Anthony Pappas, and Bartholomew Thanhauser
160 military nominations confirmed across all service branches including general and admiral ranks

house.lastSessionSummary: The House passed H.R. 5362 naming the VA multispecialty clinic in Marietta, Georgia after Colonel Michael H. Boyce by 418-0 vote. H.R. 9237, the Take Care of America's Veterans Act, saw debate continue with a motion to recommit rejected 210-211.

onTheFloor.title: Name Department of Veterans Affairs multispecialty clinic in Marietta, Georgia as Colonel Michael H. Boyce VA Clinic
Take Care of America's Veterans Act—improve veterans benefits and VA administration

Hearing on nomination of Todd Blanche to be Attorney General
